title: Witherite (Forge)
description: Blue Found Inside of The Nether
body:
ONLY MINE WITHERITE WITH NETHERITE! (UNLESS YOUR USING THE FORGE VERSION)


Witherite, Better Then Netherite Found in the Nether
Made with a smithing table.
Going to make many updates soon.
I'm Going To Add an Advancement soon.
Don't ask why it's 1.2 and not 1.0.
A Block, Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots, Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, And a Hoe.
There should be an update every 2 months.
